content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.42%, Bank Nifty -1.27%, PSU Banks -2.03% — broad weakness with energy/metals selectively bid. VIX at 18 elevated. Book is 45% deployed with 7 holdings; recent rolling performance (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) demands defense over offense. Priority is trailing SLs on profitable positions (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND) and managing existing book, not adding new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.7% with strong Q4 catalyst and bullish research view. Tightening SL from 1025 to 1030 to lock in ~4.7% gain while still giving the move room. VWAP today is 1046; price holding above 1036 intraday low. Target 1095 intact (~4.5R from new SL)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Down 1.8%, SL at 119 still gives ~3% buffer. Gold has retraced from highs but structural macro tailwinds intact (geopolitical, central bank buying, Akshaya Tritiya seasonality). Defensive hedge in book — keep current parameters."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1428.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6% at fresh 52-week high (1437/1437.90 high). Blowout Q4 (+27% PAT), strongest growth in decade. Tightening SL from 1425 to 1428 — at breakeven+ to protect against post-rally pullback. Target 1465 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, current SL 402 is tight (0.6% below CMP) and adequate. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Power sector strong but stock near 52w high — let SL/target work. No-op on MODIFY (P&L not yet ≥2% to warrant trail)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1738.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.0%, intraday range 1714-1764 today shows volatility. Organon deal is large but research flags integration/leverage risk (NEUTRAL with -0.05 modifier). Tightening SL slightly from 1735 to 1738 (just above entry to lock in breakeven+) given the post-news exhaustion and bearish MACD crossover. Target 1830 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, SL 315 still ~1.4% below CMP. Defensive transmission play, Q4 results May 19 catalyst pending. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%, SL 463 tight at ~0.7% below CMP. Q4 PAT +12% beat but FY26 production -2% and inventory +21% are flags. Let SL define risk; thesis intact short-term on summer power demand."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY at 443 still working. Stock now at 460 (well above limit), so order will not fill at current levels. Letting it stand — energy/power cluster already heavy in book (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + JSWENERGY interest). Will not stack second order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "JSWENERGY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong setup at 52w high with Jefferies Buy and Vijayanagar green H2 catalyst, BUT power/energy cluster already concentrated in book (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA + pending TATAPOWER BUY). Adding JSWENERGY would breach cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AARTIIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Attractive breakout to 52w high with UBS double upgrade and USD 150M contract win. However, intraday already lost momentum (closed near lows of session, 497 vs 506 high), and book is 45% deployed with negative recent P&L profile. Pass on chase; would re-evaluate on consolidation above 500 with volume."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research (Brazil ANVISA rejection, exchange clarification on volume, US tariff overhang). Despite the day's bounce, fundamentals don't support new long. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.5% YoY miss; price chopping in 1340-1390. Brokerage targets bullish but near-term momentum unclear. Skip on this tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HDFCBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Banking sector under pressure today, HDFCBANK still bleeding from 813 to 786. Wait for sector stabilization before adding banking exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INTELLECT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Mid-cap IT in a -16% YTD sector with Q3 PAT -72% QoQ. Today's 5% pop is a bounce, not a trend. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PVRINOX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research with promoter pledge concerns and weak Q4 vs Q3. Today's 5% pop without a clear catalyst is suspect. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~4.7% gain with trail to 1030; thesis intact, give room to 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 (3% buffer) adequate. Gold defensive hedge, structural thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1428.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high with strong Q4 — trail SL above entry to breakeven+, protect against pullback."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "P&L only +0.4%, SL already tight at 402. Wait for stronger move before trailing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1738.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL just above entry given Organon integration risk and bearish MACD crossover. Protect breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL 315 reasonable. Q4 catalyst May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 463 (0.7% buffer) already defines risk. Let it work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "JSWENERGY, AARTIIND, TATAPOWER worth re-evaluating if they consolidate. RELIANCE on a clean reclaim above 1390 with volume. HDFCBANK on banking sector stabilization above 800. PHARMABEES and HINDZINC pending limits — let them work or cancel next tick if no progress.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with energy/power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) already at meaningful weight. Three additional pending BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) further commit capital — explains why no new entries today. Rolling 5-day performance is poor (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor, -INR 4,408 net). Defense mode: lock in gains on PNBHOUSING/NESTLEIND/SUNPHARMA, let losers' SLs do their job, no new chases. If pending orders don't fill by EOD tomorrow, will reassess and likely cancel."
}
